result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 8:   JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate >= b.start_dt AND ch.creat...
                                          ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-10' AS start_dt, DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_dt
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM(BOTH FROM REGEXP_REPLACE(oldvalue__c, '^#', '')) AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate >= b.start_dt AND ch.createddate < b.end_dt
  WHERE LOWER(field__c) = 'owner'
    AND oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM REGEXP_REPLACE(oldvalue__c, '^#', '')), '') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
), handled AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM(BOTH FROM REGEXP_REPLACE(v.agent_id_raw, '^#', '')) AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT ownerid AS agent_id_raw, id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    JOIN bounds b ON c.createddate >= b.start_dt AND c.createddate < b.end_dt
    WHERE ownerid IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id_raw, caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate >= b.start_dt AND ch.createddate < b.end_dt
    WHERE LOWER(field__c) = 'owner'
      AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  ) v
  WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM REGEXP_REPLACE(v.agent_id_raw, '^#', '')), '') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT h.agent_id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-10' AS start_dt, DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_dt
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM(BOTH FROM REGEXP_REPLACE(oldvalue__c, '^#', '')) AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate >= b.start_dt AND ch.createddate < b.end_dt
  WHERE LOWER(field__c) = 'owner'
    AND oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM REGEXP_REPLACE(oldvalue__c, '^#', '')), '') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
), handled AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM(BOTH FROM REGEXP_REPLACE(v.agent_id_raw, '^#', '')) AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT ownerid AS agent_id_raw, id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    JOIN bounds b ON c.createddate >= b.start_dt AND c.createddate < b.end_dt
    WHERE ownerid IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id_raw, caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate >= b.start_dt AND ch.createddate < b.end_dt
    WHERE LOWER(field__c) = 'owner'
      AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  ) v
  WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM REGEXP_REPLACE(v.agent_id_raw, '^#', '')), '') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT h.agent_id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-10' AS start_dt, DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_dt
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM(BOTH FROM REGEXP_REPLACE(oldvalue__c, '^#', '')) AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate >= b.start_dt AND ch.createddate < b.end_dt
  WHERE LOWER(field__c) = 'owner'
    AND oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM REGEXP_REPLACE(oldvalue__c, '^#', '')), '') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
), handled AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM(BOTH FROM REGEXP_REPLACE(v.agent_id_raw, '^#', '')) AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT ownerid AS agent_id_raw, id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    JOIN bounds b ON c.createddate >= b.start_dt AND c.createddate < b.end_dt
    WHERE ownerid IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id_raw, caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate >= b.start_dt AND ch.createddate < b.end_dt
    WHERE LOWER(field__c) = 'owner'
      AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  ) v
  WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM REGEXP_REPLACE(v.agent_id_raw, '^#', '')), '') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT h.agent_id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10 00:00:00' AS start_ts, TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS end_ts
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM(BOTH FROM REGEXP_REPLACE(oldvalue__c, '^#', '')) AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= b.start_ts AND ch.createddate::timestamp < b.end_ts
  WHERE LOWER(field__c) = 'owner'
    AND oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM REGEXP_REPLACE(oldvalue__c, '^#', '')), '') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
), handled AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM(BOTH FROM REGEXP_REPLACE(v.agent_id_raw, '^#', '')) AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT ownerid AS agent_id_raw, id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    JOIN bounds b ON c.createddate::timestamp >= b.start_ts AND c.createddate::timestamp < b.end_ts
    WHERE ownerid IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id_raw, caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= b.start_ts AND ch.createddate::timestamp < b.end_ts
    WHERE LOWER(field__c) = 'owner'
      AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  ) v
  WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM REGEXP_REPLACE(v.agent_id_raw, '^#', '')), '') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT h.agent_id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
